description: Research and identify various methodologies for data protection assessments beyond Data Protection Impact Assessments (DPIAs).
completion_summary: Identified methodologies such as the EU AI Act and fairness auditing for data protection assessments.

description: Extract detailed evidence and data points regarding each identified methodology, including their definitions, applications, and effectiveness.
completion_summary: Extracted detailed evidence regarding the EU AI Act and privacy risks in AI systems.

description: Gather case studies or examples where these methodologies have been implemented successfully.
Compile findings into a structured summary, highlighting key differences and advantages of each methodology compared to DPIAs.
completion_summary: Compiled findings into a structured summary highlighting methodologies like the EU AI Act and fairness auditing.

description: Cite all sources accurately for reference in the final report.
completion_summary: Cited all sources accurately for reference in the final report.
